# Production-Grade ERP — Target Gates

**Date:** 2026-06-21
**Product:** LAF Enterprise ERP V2 (clean-room .NET / MSSQL, generated by LocalAIFactory)
**Definition doc:** `docs/Production-Grade-ERP-Definition.md`
**Starting state (honest):** pilot-grade ~35% production readiness, ~37% ERPNext parity, dev-cookie auth,
SQLite, read-oriented UI, no manufacturing / HR / POS.

This is the gate table that turns "production-grade" into pass/fail checks. Each gate names the
**evidence** required (a test, a script, or a committed doc), a **blocking level**, and whether it is
**locally-achievable** (Yes / No / Partial).

**Cap rule (read first):** several **Critical** gates are **external / operator-owned** — real auth, TLS,
MSSQL production load, and an external security review. Until an operator supplies these, the
production-grade score is **capped**: the product can reach 100% of what is *locally* producible and
still not be certified production-grade. We do not overclaim; readiness ≠ the attribute.

**Locally-achievable legend:** **Yes** = codebase + tests + committed docs satisfy it on a dev machine.
**Partial** = mechanism is locally producible, but full production proof needs an operator host/party.
**No** = the attribute is fundamentally external (the product ships only the *seam* + docs).

---

## Critical gates — accounting correctness, controls, audit, RBAC, build/tests green, no HTTP 500
*(Blocking: Critical. These must pass — or, for external ones, be operator-supplied — for production.)*

| gateId | Requirement | Expected evidence | Blocking | Locally-achievable |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| C-01 | Double-entry GL always balances (debits = credits, globally) | Domain test `GeneralLedger_*` asserting global balance + live-run proof (e.g. 2250 = 2250) | Critical | Yes |
| C-02 | Journal entry refuses unbalanced submission | Domain test asserting submit rejected when debits ≠ credits | Critical | Yes |
| C-03 | Posted documents immutable; cancel reverses, never edits | Domain test asserting reversal voucher on cancel, no in-place edit | Critical | Yes |
| C-04 | Trial balance reconciles to GL (total debits = total credits) | Report test asserting TB balance against posted dataset | Critical | Yes |
| C-05 | Maker/checker enforced (submitter ≠ approver) | Domain test + explicit end-to-end approval scenario | Critical | Yes |
| C-06 | Mandatory reject reason + threshold/approval routing | Workflow test asserting reject requires reason; threshold routing test | Critical | Yes |
| C-07 | Immutable audit trail on every state transition | Audit test (who/what/when/before-after), non-deletable | Critical | Yes |
| C-08 | RBAC enforced at controller/service boundary (allow + deny) | API integration tests for allow and deny per role | Critical | Yes |
| C-09 | `dotnet build` (Release) 0 errors | CI / `dotnet build LAF-EnterpriseERP.slnx -c Release` log | Critical | Yes |
| C-10 | Automated test suite green (domain + integration) | `dotnet test` LafErp.Tests all-pass log (V2: 74/74) | Critical | Yes |
| C-11 | No HTTP 500s across all pages + APIs on live run | Live-run proof: all pages/APIs 200, 0 HTTP 500 | Critical | Yes |
| C-12 | EF migrations replace `EnsureCreated` (controlled MSSQL upgrades) | Migration files committed + `database update` applies cleanly | Critical | Yes |
| C-13 | **Real authentication** (corporate IdP / SSO / Windows auth or hardened credential store) | Pluggable auth seam + integration doc **+ operator IdP binding** | Critical | **No (external)** |
| C-14 | **TLS / HSTS** with real certificates in front of the app | TLS-ready middleware (HSTS/redirect/forwarded-headers) **+ operator cert + termination** | Critical | **No (external)** |
| C-15 | **External (third-party) security review / pen-test** with findings remediated | Independent review report + remediation evidence | Critical | **No (external)** |

**Critical total: 15 — locally-achievable Yes: 12, No (external): 3, Partial: 0.**
External Critical items (C-13, C-14, C-15) **cap the score** until an operator supplies them.

---

## High gates — inventory correctness, P&L/BS, API + UI CRUD, Playwright, real-life scenarios, real auth posture
*(Blocking: High.)*

| gateId | Requirement | Expected evidence | Blocking | Locally-achievable |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| H-01 | Immutable, append-only stock ledger | Domain test asserting ledger append-only + derived balance | High | Yes |
| H-02 | Moving-average valuation ties to inventory GL | Domain test asserting valuation matches GL inventory account | High | Yes |
| H-03 | Negative-stock guard | Domain test asserting issue beyond stock is rejected | High | Yes |
| H-04 | Stock adjustment posts both stock ledger and GL | Integration test asserting dual posting | High | Yes |
| H-05 | Profit & Loss report correct (income − expense) | Report test vs known dataset, reconciles to TB (**NotStarted today**) | High | Yes |
| H-06 | Balance Sheet correct (assets = liab + equity) | Report test vs known dataset, reconciles to TB (**NotStarted today**) | High | Yes |
| H-07 | AR / AP subledgers + aging reconcile to control accounts | Aging report test vs dated dataset (**NotStarted today**) | High | Yes |
| H-08 | Complete REST CRUD + actions per module | API integration tests covering CRUD + submit/cancel/approve (**partial today**) | High | Yes |
| H-09 | UI create/edit/delete forms for every primary entity | UI/integration tests for write paths (**read-oriented today**) | High | Yes |
| H-10 | Search / filter / sort / pagination on all lists | List endpoint + UI tests for each capability | High | Yes |
| H-11 | Numbering series atomic, gapless under concurrency | Concurrency test asserting no gaps/duplicates | High | Yes |
| H-12 | Playwright covers login + CRUD + approval journeys | `npx playwright test` green (V2: 12 green, extend to CRUD/approval) | High | Yes |
| H-13 | Real-life multi-module scenario reconciles end-to-end | Scenario test: order→invoice→payment→GL/stock reconcile w/ approval | High | Yes |
| H-14 | Multi-company isolation (no cross-company read/post) | Integration test asserting company A cannot access company B | High | Yes |
| H-15 | Multi-currency base-currency GL postings + rounding | Domain test on rate capture, base posting, rounding | High | Yes |
| H-16 | Tax computed and posted to correct GL accounts | Domain test on sales/purchase tax computation + posting | High | Yes |
| H-17 | Production-scale performance/load on MSSQL host | Load smoke (concurrent users, real volume) on **operator MSSQL host** | High | **Partial (dev smoke Yes; prod-scale external)** |

**High total: 17 — locally-achievable Yes: 16, Partial: 1 (H-17), No: 0.**

---

## Medium gates — extended-module skeletons, reports, deployment + backup docs, print/export, import/export
*(Blocking: Medium.)*

| gateId | Requirement | Expected evidence | Blocking | Locally-achievable |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| M-01 | Manufacturing skeleton (BOM, work order, quality entities + read screens + documented gap) | Entities + read-screen tests + gap doc (**NotStarted today**) | Medium | Yes |
| M-02 | HR skeleton (employee master + read screens); statutory payroll out of scope | Employee CRUD tests + documented payroll-is-external note | Medium | **Partial (skeleton Yes; statutory payroll external)** |
| M-03 | POS skeleton (session + invoice/stock/GL posting); terminal integration out of scope | Skeleton test + documented terminal-is-external note | Medium | **Partial (skeleton Yes; terminal external)** |
| M-04 | CRM leads/opportunities lifecycle + conversion | Lifecycle + conversion tests (**partial today**) | Medium | Yes |
| M-05 | Projects & tasks lifecycle | Task state-transition tests (**partial today**) | Medium | Yes |
| M-06 | Support tickets workflow + audit | Ticket lifecycle test (**partial today**) | Medium | Yes |
| M-07 | Assets register + depreciation posting to GL | Depreciation posting test (**partial today**) | Medium | Yes |
| M-08 | Reports + dashboard parameterized by company/period, correctness-tested | Report correctness tests + dashboard render test | Medium | Yes |
| M-09 | Deployment doc (IIS/Kestrel + MSSQL + migrations + config), executable by operator | Committed deployment guide + applied-migration evidence | Medium | Yes (target host operator-owned) |
| M-10 | Backup / restore procedure for MSSQL | Committed backup+restore doc; **prod restore drill operator-owned** | Medium | **Partial (procedure Yes; prod drill external)** |
| M-11 | Security model document matching implemented controls | Committed security-model doc cross-checked to code | Medium | Yes |
| M-12 | Print / export templates (PDF/HTML/CSV) for key documents | Render test for invoice/statement templates | Medium | Yes |
| M-13 | Import / export with validation + error report (round-trip) | Round-trip import/export test (**partial today**) | Medium | Yes |
| M-14 | Internal / automated security review pass (pre-external) | Internal review report + dispositioned findings | Medium | Yes |
| M-15 | Recorded code review with findings dispositioned (fixes re-emitted in generator) | Code-review record + re-emission evidence | Medium | Yes |

**Medium total: 15 — locally-achievable Yes: 12, Partial: 3 (M-02, M-03, M-10), No: 0.**

---

## Low gates — notifications, custom fields, website / eCommerce
*(Blocking: Low.)*

| gateId | Requirement | Expected evidence | Blocking | Locally-achievable |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| L-01 | In-app notifications (approval pending, ticket assigned); email channel optional | In-app notification test; email noted as operator SMTP | Low | **Partial (in-app Yes; email external SMTP)** |
| L-02 | Admin-defined custom fields round-trip (persist/validate/UI/API/print) | Custom-field round-trip test (**custom-field UI NotStarted today**) | Low | Yes |
| L-03 | Website / eCommerce skeleton (catalog/portal stub); live storefront out of scope | Skeleton/portal test + documented gateway-is-external note | Low | **Partial (skeleton Yes; live gateway/storefront external)** |

**Low total: 3 — locally-achievable Yes: 1, Partial: 2 (L-01, L-03), No: 0.**

---

## Totals

| Blocking | Gates | Yes (locally-achievable) | Partial | No (external/operator-owned) |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| Critical | 15 | 12 | 0 | 3 |
| High | 17 | 16 | 1 | 0 |
| Medium | 15 | 12 | 3 | 0 |
| Low | 3 | 1 | 2 | 0 |
| **All** | **50** | **41** | **6** | **3** |

- **41 / 50 gates are fully locally-achievable** by the generated codebase + its tests + committed docs.
- **6 gates are partial** — locally producible mechanism, but full production proof needs an operator
  host or party (H-17 MSSQL load, M-02 statutory payroll, M-03 POS terminal, M-10 prod restore drill,
  L-01 email/SMTP, L-03 live storefront/gateway).
- **3 gates are fully external (No)** and are all **Critical**: **C-13 real auth, C-14 TLS, C-15 external
  security review.** These, plus the external portion of **H-17 (MSSQL production load)**, are the items
  that **cap the production-grade score** until an operator supplies them.

## Score cap statement

The generated product can pass **every locally-achievable gate (41 Yes + the local portion of the 6
Partial)** and still **must not be certified production-grade**, because three Critical gates (C-13,
C-14, C-15) and the production-scale portion of H-17 are external/operator-owned. The honest ceiling for
the *locally-producible* deliverable is therefore "production-**ready**, pending operator-supplied auth,
TLS, MSSQL load proof, and an independent security review." The production-readiness gate (C-aggregate)
must report this cap rather than a 100% pass while any external Critical item is outstanding.
